creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Adrian Chadd <adrian@freebsd.org> -----

Date: Sun, 13 Apr 2014 15:51:35 -0700
From: Adrian Chadd <adrian@freebsd.org>
To: linimon@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-bugs@freebsd.org, "freebsd-wireless@freebsd.org" <freebsd-wireless@freebsd.org>
Subject: Re: kern/188415: [ath] Poor Atheros AR9565 performance

Is ATH_ENABLE_11N In the kernel?

What's the output of 'sysctl dev.ath.0.txagg' ? (it's logged in dmesg.)

----- End forwarded message -----
